title: [CI:DOCS] Added an additional troubleshooting problem and solution
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: @Jared-Sprague looks like you neglected to sign your commits, and our CI won't be happy until you do so.

@TomSweeneyRedHat 

Ok I amended all my commits with: 

```
Signed-off-by: Jared Sprague <jared@caramelcode.com>
```

Does that look right now?
@giuseppe Ok all commits squashed into a single commit. Thanks!

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *Jared-Sprague* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
